item.title: TBH I am with the crazy on this one!
item.description: Woman throws portable speaker into the sea. Not jumping to conclusions here, we can’t tell if there was a polite request to stop polluting everyone else’s ears with your selfish need to make everyone listen to your crap or anything prior to this moment! Either way, there are a few times when I had wished crazy IDGAF lady was there. Think of others before you inflict your noise pollution on them. There. That didn’t sound biased at all did it!

item.title: An Attack That Isn't An Attack? Maybe firing IT was not a good idea? 900,000 max users, that's a good number for social media, right?
item.description: Elon Musk’s “conversation” with former President Donald Trump got off to a rocky start. The interview, which was hosted on X Spaces and scheduled to begin at 8PM ET Monday night, crashed immediately and didn’t begin until 42 minutes later. Those who did manage to get into the Space, including several Verge staffers, said it kicked off with lo-fi techno playing from Trump’s account for roughly 30 minutes. 18 minutes after the conversation was supposed to begin, Musk claimed that X was the target of a “massive DDOS attack” that had made it impossible for the Space to proceed as planned. The rest of X appears to be working normally, however, and a source at the company confirmed to The Verge that there wasn’t actually a denial-of-service attack. Another X staffer said there was a “99 percent” chance Elon was lying about an attack. https://www.theverge.com/2024/8/12/24219121/donald-trump-elon-musk-interview-x-twitter-crashes Musk And Trump On The Economy Musk and Trump exchange views on what's wrong with the economy. Musk proposes a "government efficiency commission." He says he'd be happy to help out with that. https://www.investors.com/news/donald-trump-elon-musk-tesla-stock-truth-social/ https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/total-disaster-elon-musk-s-trump-interview-flops-immediately-with-tech-glitches-he-claims-massive-ddos-attack/ar-AA1oGsGV
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: I Stole This Dump So You Don't Have To. Tuesday Random Meme Dump Of Pure Chaos
item.description:
1. When that BOOTY IS TOO GOOD
2. Asshat who attacks older man gets what he deserves
3. Legendary sword speed
4. The Only Sport that Matters
5. The Only Sport that Matters
6. The Only Sport that Matters
7. When Cenobites propose
8.The Only Sport that Matters
9.The Only Sport that Matters
10. Oh God, am I having sport... stroke. What is this, have you ever hear the tragedy of Darth Plagueis the wise? No. I thought not, It's No story the jedi would tell you. It's a sith legend. Darth Plagueis was a Dark Lord of the sith. He was so powerful, Yet so wise. He could use the force to influence the medi chlorians to create, Life. He had such a knowledge of the Dark side, He could even keep the ones he cared about, From dying. He could actually, Save the ones he cared about from death? The dark side of the force is a pathway to many abilities some consider to be unnatural. Well what happened to him? Darth Plagueis became so powerful that the only thing he feared was losing his power, Which eventually of course he did. Unfortunately, He taught his apprentice everything he knew. Then his apprentice killed him in his sleep. Ironic, He could save others from death, But not himself. Is it possible to learn this power? Not from a jedi.
11. Ok I'm better now, and this lady had her face shoved in a fan
12. Home Depot Eminem
13
14. Trying to be healthy be like
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. It was inspired by games like The Stanley Parable. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you! Thank you for supporting our dream and helping us share our wild adventure with the world!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Dutch Olympic swimmer Sharon van Rouwendaal won gold in the women's 10,000-meter open water race in honor of her late dog, Rio. She said, "I will swim for him with my whole heart — and I did it — I won for him."

item.dc:creator: larskongo

item.title: Reading = emotions
item.description: It was a 3 book series I chose at random and ended up falling in love with. It's not groundbreaking or anything, and I'm sure I could have criticisms if I tried, but I read to enjoy things. The story and characters were so enjoyable for me, and I cried at the ending(s) because they were sad and happy and morose and made me feel all the things. Then trying to explain why I was crying over a book to my wife is like talking to a wall. She doesn't get it. She never reads and all of her media is either on a streaming service or it's YT Shorts/Facebook Reels. It's frustrating to have so little in common with my spouse. Oh well. Another thing to talk about in therapy. The book series was "The Bone Witch" by Rin Chupeco. Medieval fantasy with magic.
item.dc:creator: AzraelEternity

item.title: I never thought I'd get this far
item.description:
I got the job! You're looking at the new social media manager and content creator for fine dining folks.
Thank you for everyone's kind words and support on my last post. https://imgur.com/gallery/Acu68ru Y'all I got my dream job after being laid off 6 months ago. I get to do everything from food photography, video, editing, design. All while working with fun people who cook dank food.
My first video is live on their Instagram. Woohoo! This is for a steakhouse event we're doing this week. If you're ever in Portland you should check em out. Here's my video: https://www.instagram.com/reel/C-lG9oFvebh/?igsh=MTQwN2RuejA4cHNpMw==
The best part is I get to eat all the food when we finish shooting.
For the first time in my life my boss actually trusts me and gives me full creativity which is the greatest feeling. Especially after getting ideas shot down at agencies who pride themselves on being open-minded. I'm learning a lot as I go. I've only ever filmed myself cooking so doing photography and directing others has been interesting but I love it so far. This video is for their tea lounge.
Fig tax. Fig is in his rebellious teenager phase. I think he's 8 months now.
Constantly yelling at me. He slams the door a lot and plays Slipknot in his room.
If you're in a rough patch or recently lost your job, who knows maybe your dream job is right around the corner. Or maybe Jeff Bezos will hit you with his car and you'll be set for life. But who am I to say, I'm just a stranger on the interwebs. TLDR; Thanks for always supporting me Imgur <3
item.dc:creator: ItsMoni

item.title: PSA - Lilly if the Valley is poisonous yet this asshat is selling it as tea on tiktok

item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Meet Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala)
item.description:
Fun fact! Deaf Cat Magoo/Oogala Magoogala is officially Googleable ..or Ooogla Magoogleable you could say. Here's the lore.
3 years ago, as my son and I were walking to school, we heard a desperate scream from behind us. It was clearly a cat in distress. We had to around to help the poor baby.
I'm 5'2"..even with my kindergartener standing on my shoulders, the two of us still couldn't reach her. I called my husband and gave him no context other than we needed immediate assistance. He showed up right away.
He was able to coax her out of the tree and get her into the car. She was an absolute purr machine ramming her little face into ours as a token of her gratitude.
My husband fell in love.
I asked him not to get too attached as we were already at max catpacity.
But he insisted she invade our peaceful household, and he introduced her to our cats anyway. She walked in with the kind of confidence that would have you assume she had already lived in our house for years.
We were baffled when she was completely unbothered by the other cats hissing in her face. She didn't even flinch.
We called her Magoo, but she never responded to it. She never responded to anything actually. Anytime we would tell her to get down, she would just stare at us. Holy shit. We lived with the world's most defiant cat.
Our other cats would lose their minds when they'd hear the crinkle of the cat food bag or the crack of a can, but Magoo wouldn't even bother waking up most of the time. It took an entire month for us to realize that she hadn't been ignoring us, she was just deaf.
That would explain her abnormal meow and heavy sleeping ability. Here's a compilation of me waking her up on different days. Unmute.
Day 2
Day 3
Day 4
Day 5
It really didn't matter what we put on this portion of the shelf. She would knock it all off to lay there anyway. So I made the "Basket of Goo" a permanent installation.
The other cats hated the sound of this mechanical fish, but Magoo remained fearless. She was never afraid anything. In fact, she enjoys the vibrations of most things that would terrify any normal cat.
Magoo fucking hates closed doors. She would sit and scream until somebody would open the goddamn door for her.
When we moved, we made sure that was no longer going to be an issue.
She constantly demands attention.
Magoo is a bad kitty.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Destroyer of skin
Destroyer of Christmas
Privacy is never an option
Everything is Magoo's business.
She even has fan art! (It's me. I'm the fan)
You can catch her starring on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka where you can "Feed Magoo"
Join us on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka We're absolutely drowning in memes and pet tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.dc:creator: screaminginside365

item.title: Good night Imgur...
item.description: Ted Lasso. Such a good series. Developed by the same gentleman who did Scrubs, Spin City, and other shows. This is how I hope it works. That in the end, I am judged not by my worst mistakes, of which I have made quite a few, but by how I've tried to change and grow. That what I leave behind is a better place than I came into. Perhaps tiny octopus is being maudlin because he's recently single and is wondering what he could have done differently. Maybe it's because things of late have reminded him of ghosts of the past. Whatever it is, it will pass. I hope that you all find peace and quiet joy in your coming days. And please, remember to offer grace and forgiveness to those who need it the most.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Be A Good Dad
item.description: This is too wholesome to not share. If you happen to know the sauce recipe, please let me know, and I'll update this post with the info. Edit to add: @dadgotbars on TikTok. FP Edit: I hope ya'll enjoyed this. I learned something new, too! Bonus! Give your loved ones, including you, a hug today!
item.dc:creator: grandopening
